name: Green Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the lentils.
2. Drain and rinse the lentils, then add salt.
3. Set aside.
4. Heat olive oil in a pot to medium heat.
5. Add grated onion and parsley.
6. Cook until golden color.
7. Add 4 liters of water and lentils.
8. Bring to a boil.
9. Add bay leaves, garlic, basil, pepper, tomatoes, and tomato paste.
10. Cook for 2 1/2 hours, stirring every half hour.
11. Check the cooking lentils and ensure there is enough water.
12. Before serving, add red vinegar and mix well.
13. Check seasonings.
